name: Office of Student Involvement (OSI)
summary: OSI supports student success and enhances the campus environment by focusing on our core principles – Connect, Involve, Impact - through quality programs, services, student leadership opportunities, and intentional environments.

name: Volunteer UCF
summary: Volunteer UCF is dedicated to promoting civic engagement and education on various social issues to the UCF student body.

name: 4EVER KNIGHTS
summary: Our mission is to educate students on the importance of establishing and maintaining a lifelong relationship with UCF through the power of philanthropy.

name: Association for Computing Machinery Special Interest Group on Computer Graphics and Interactive Techniques
summary: ACM SIGGRAPH brings together students seeking a career in animation and VFX to help bridge the gap between student life and the professional world while offering fun networking events and professional development workshops.

name: Collegiate National Association for Music Education
summary: The mission of the Florida Music Educators Association is to promote quality, comprehensive music education for all Florida Students as a part of their complete education.

name: Graduate Anthropology Association
summary: The mission of the Graduate Anthropology Association is to provide a setting where students can discuss current research topics in Anthropology and assist fellow classmates in conducting graduate level research.

name: Graduate Writers Association
summary: The Graduate Writers' Association (GWA) helps students transition from the university setting to a professional career in the field of English by designing and participating in networking and professional development opportunities.

name: Graphic Design Student Association
summary: GDSA is a student-run organization at the University of Central Florida. As a group, we strive to open up a dialogue about design with students through a series of discussions, speakers, workshops and other related events. Learn more on our website.

name: Association of Latino Professionals For America
summary: The Association of Latino Professionals For America at the University of Central Florida (ALPFA UCF) is a professional development organization that seeks to build and grow the next generation of leaders and professionals.

name: Delta Epsilon Chi
summary: To provide leadership, educational, and professional development opportunities for its members and to promote student interest and involvement in the Collegiate DECA sponsored competitions and conferences.

name: Theta Sigma Chapter of the International Fraternity of Delta Sigma Pi
summary: Delta Sigma Pi is a professional fraternity organized to foster the study of business in universities; to encourage scholarship, social activity and the association of students for their mutual advancement by research and practice.

name: Financial Management Association
summary: The Financial Management Association at the University of Central Florida is dedicated to providing the student body with the opportunity to develop professionally through workshops, conference trips, networking events, and hosting weekly speaker events.

name: National Association of Black Accountants
summary: NABA UCF empowers students of all majors through mentorship, networking, and career opportunities. Join a supportive community, connect with top employers, and unlock your full potential—together we lift as we climb! Email nabaucf@gmail.com

name: Real Estate Society
summary: The Real Estate Society seeks to cultivate students' interest in real estate by bringing in guest speakers, attending networking events, and hosting social events with other business clubs. We aim to bridge the gap between students and professionals.

name: Student Personnel Association
summary: SPA provides undergraduate and graduate students, especially those in or pursuing the Student Personnel program, with the opportunity to collaborate with others who are interested in student affairs at a college or university.

name: Air Force ROTC
summary:
To educate, train, and mentor leaders of character through academic, physical, and professional development. 

Want to learn more about our program or inquire about joining? 
Please visit https://airforce.ucf.edu or email afrotc@ucf.edu

name: American Institute of Aeronautics and Astronautics
summary:
Bridging the gap between students and the aerospace industry through projects, tours, workshops, events, and more! Join our Discord for updates and connect with members! <https://discord.gg/CTc2RtCn>

Must be a dues paying member to join KnightConnect!

name: American Society of Civil Engineers at the University of Central Florida
summary: An organization that aims to promote professionalism, leadership and hands-on learning for civil, environmental, or construction engineering students. Follow us on Instagram @asceucf and Join our Discord https://discord.gg/s4S4U33Y to stay up to date!

name: Material Advantage
summary: Our objective is to promote the understanding and application of the interdisciplinary field of Materials Science and Engineering in terms of research, design, reliable manufacture, economic and social benefits.

name: Associated Builders & Contractors
summary: Discover your path to success in the construction industry with ABC UCF Student Chapter. As a registered student organization, we connect like-minded individuals, offering networking opportunities, industry connections, valuable insights, and much more.

name: Association for Computing Machinery
summary: ACM  is an international scientific and educational organization advancing computer science, computer engineering, and IT. The on-campus chapter offers events ranging from tutorials on programming topics to technical interview workshops and more

name: Institute of Industrial and Systems Engineers
summary: Provides professional networking and seminars for those in the Industrial Engineering and Systems Engineering discipline.

name: National Society of Black Engineers
summary: The National Society of Black Engineers Mission Statement is, "To increase the number of culturally responsible Black Engineers, who excel academically, succeed professionally, and positively impact the community."

name: Formula Student
summary: Knights Racing - Formula SAE at UCF comprises of a team that designs builds and competes a student built formula style vehicle at competitions across the United States.

name: Society of Environmental Engineers
summary: SEE incorporates all sections of environmental engineering: solid and hazardous waste, air pollution, water, and wastewater. We also work with several professional engineering groups such as AWWA, AWMA, and FWEA.

name: Society of Hispanic Professional Engineers
summary: To promote the development of Hispanics in engineering, science and other technical professions; To achieve educational excellence, economic opportunity and social equity; To improve our communities through science and technology.

name: Society of Women Engineers
summary: The Society of Women Engineers aims to empower women to aspire, advance and succeed as engineers and leaders. Our section hosts various events each month to encourage members to develop themselves professionally and meet other women in engineering.

name: Theta Tau Professional Engineering Fraternity
summary: The purpose of Theta Tau is to develop and maintain a high standard of professional interest among its members, and to unite them in a strong bond of fraternal fellowship.

name: Bachelors of Social Work Student Association
summary: The Bachelors of Social Work Student Association promotes the field of social work by enhancing the lives of individuals, families, and communities through community service and social interactions.

name: Emergency Management Student Association
summary: The mission of EMSA is to provide a means for continuing Emergency Management education outside the classroom; to supplement a student’s education, cultivate relationships between peers, and to continue to professionalize the academic field of Emergency

name: National Black Law Student Association
summary: UCF NBLSA is dedicated to fostering academic and professional competence, and bringing about meaningful legal and political changes in our communities. We welcome all UCF Students, regardless of background.

name: Phi Alpha Delta Pre-Law Fraternity
summary:
Visit www.ucfpad.com for more information

Phi Alpha Delta Law Fraternity, International is a professional law fraternity advancing integrity, compassion and courage through service to the student, the school, the profession and the community.

name: Student Health Information Management Association
summary: It is our mission to promote, educate, and represent the future of the HIM profession by creating educational events for our departments' students and volunteering to contribute to our campus and community.

name: Meeting Professionals International
summary: MPI Knights is a student organization that partners with our local professional chapter to offer students education, networking, and convention experience in Orlando. We have events for students in the hospitality, event and entertainment industry!

name: Association of Pre-Physician Assistants
summary: The mission of the Association of Pre-Physician Associates is to promote the underrepresented PA profession as well as to shape well-rounded students and assist them in becoming exceptional candidates for acceptance into a PA Program.

name: Pre-Optometry Association
summary: The mission of the Pre-Optometry Association is to prepare students for the optometry profession. Students can learn about the application process, gain insights from optometrists, and participate in volunteer activities.

name: Astronomy Society
summary: Our organization is dedicated to fostering a deep appreciation for the mysteries of the cosmos while also providing valuable opportunities for students aspiring to take on leadership roles and build careers in astronomy.

name: Forensic Science Association
summary: The Forensic Science Association is a pre-professional organization at UCF that focuses on educating the Central Florida community about forensic science and providing support to forensic science majors by connecting them to incredible opportunities.

name: Quotes, the Ad/PR Club at UCF
summary: Welcome to Quotes, the Advertising/Public Relations Club at UCF. Quotes is the local student chapter of the Florida Public Relations Association. The value of PR is essential across all industries and fields, including business, health, law and more.

name: Radio Television Digital News Association
summary: Radio Television Digital News Association at UCF is a student chapter of the national Radio Television Digital News Association.

name: Society of Physics Students
summary: The Society of Physics Students is a pre-professional organization that aims to cultivate knowledge and understanding of physics among undergraduate students, and provide them with resources to help them navigate physics as a career path.

name: Society of Professional Journalists
summary: The UCF chapter of the Society of Professional Journalists promotes achievement and provides real-world experience prior to entering the field of journalism following graduation.

name: Collegiate Percussive Arts Society
summary: The UCF Collegiate Percussive Arts Society is dedicated to fostering the highest quality percussion students through clinics, improved rehearsal facilities, and technological advances.

name: Contemporary A Cappella Society at the University of Central Florida
summary: The Contemporary A Cappella Society is a nationwide organization intended to bridge the gap between a cappella performers and fans. At UCF, the first-ever collegiate chapter encompasses five groups that perform, travel, and compete across the country.

name: The Cypress Dome Society
summary: The Cypress Dome is a student-produced literary journal that publishes creative writing and visual art by University of Central Florida students.

name: Project Spotlight
summary: Project Spotlight is a student developmental theatre company dedicated to workshopping and producing new, student-written plays while providing students of all majors opportunities to create theatre in multiple capacities.

name: Asian Student Association
summary: The Asian Student Association, founded in 1999, is a non-profit organization at the University of Central Florida. We are here to provide a social and academic support network for the Asian American community at UCF.

name: The Black Female Development Circle, Inc.
summary: To Educate, Explore, Enhance, and Celebrate womanhood on campus and in the community by building upon the intellectual capacity of women through Self-Awareness, Self-Respect, and Self-Actualization. ✨

name: Black Student Union
summary:
We are the Black Student Union at the University of Central Florida. 

Our purpose is to serve as the official voice for the black community on campus.

name: The National Council of Negro Women
summary: The National Council of Negro Women is a nationally recognized nonprofit organization with a mission to Lead, Develop and Advocate for women of color. The National Council of Negro Women at UCF has been making a lasting contribution since 2005.

name: Venezuelan Student Association
summary: VENSA is a student organization dedicated to uniting the Venezuelan community at UCF and promoting social gatherings and cultural appreciation.

name: American Society of Highway Engineers
summary: To provide a forum for members and partners of the highway industry that supports education, innovation, and fellowship; promoting a safe and efficient highway system.

name: Association of Doctoral Students in Exceptional Education
summary: The Association of Doctoral Students in Exceptional Education is a professional organization that focuses on supporting doctoral students, research, and supporting doctoral students through their dissertations.

name: Counselor Education Doctoral Students Organization
summary: The Counselor Education Doctoral Student Organization (CEDSO) is the student association specifically for doctoral students in counselor education at UCF.

name: Doctoral Organization of Clinical Students in Psychology
summary: Mission: Promote the professional development of doctoral level graduate students in clinical psychology; Provide a liaison between the students, faculty, and administration; Increase the spirit of cohesion between the university and the community

name: Master of Social Work Student Association
summary: To enhance the graduate education experience through social service activities and community involvement.

name: OPTICA UCF Student Chapter
summary: The purpose of OPTICA shall be to promote the discipline of optics through an organized effort of study, research, and application. We will disseminate knowledge in the field of optics to the public and promote further professional development.

name: Spanish Graduate Association
summary: The mission of the Spanish Graduate Association SaGA is to promote, through a professional and academic environment, the growth of Spanish undergraduate and graduate students as well as other students interested in Hispanic language and culture.

name: Student Association of School Psychologists
summary: Our purpose is to promote awareness of the role of the school psychologist within the community and to promote professional and academic excellence among our members.

name: Student Professionals for Industrial Organizational Psychology
summary: For undergraduate and graduate students interested in industrial-organizational psychology and allied fields.

name: Lambda Theta Phi Latin Fraternity, Inc.
summary: The first Latino Fraternity on the UCF campus and in the United States. We're a group of professional students focused on academic excellence and assisting the community. The ideals of this brotherhood are Unity, Respect, Brotherhood, Culture, and Pride.

name: Chi Omega Fraternity
summary:
Chi Omega is an intergenerational women’s organization committed to our purposes:

Friendship
Personal Integrity
Service to Others
Academic Excellence and Intellectual Pursuits
Community and Campus Involvement
Personal and Career Development

name: Zeta Tau Alpha Fraternity
summary: Making a difference in the lives of our members by developing the potential of each individual through innovative programming, emphasizing leadership development, service, academic achievement and continued personal growth for our women.

name: Alpha Phi Sigma Criminal Justice Honor Society
summary: To recognize and promote high scholastic standards and integrity in the criminal justice profession, and to establish the benefits of scientific research and continuing education.

name: Kappa Kappa Psi Fraternity Eta Sigma
summary: To Serve, To Lead, To Honor, To Strive.

name: Omicron Delta Kappa National Leadership Honor Society
summary: National leadership honor society for UCF students

name: Phi Alpha Social Work Honor Society
summary: Recognize academic achievement and service work of MSW and BSW Students at UCF

name: Phi Alpha Theta Honor Society
summary: Phi Alpha Theta History Honor Society encompasses social and academic interests of undergraduate and graduate students at UCF.

name: Phi Eta Sigma National Honor Society
summary: The mission of Phi Eta Sigma is to not only reward academic excellence, but to encourage students to continue to excel in their scholastic endeavors.

name: Tau Beta Pi - The Engineering Honor Society
summary: Tau Beta Pi is the only engineering honor society representing the entire engineering profession. Membership is by invitation only of eligible students.

name: Amateur Radio Club at UCF
summary: The club strives to teach and advance the radio art, and to expand the existing reservoir within the amateur radio community of trained operators, technicians, and electronics specialists and hobbyists.

name: Anime Spot
summary:
We are Anime Spot, the anime club at the University of Central Florida!

We are a highly active club at the University of Central Florida that has been around since 2006. We host weekly themed anime viewings and other fun events!

name: Entrepreneurship Club
summary:
The purpose of the club is to foster interest in entrepreneurship. We're focused on building a community of entrepreneurs along with providing valuable resources such as workshops, speaker series,
and networking events.

name: Men of Integrity
summary: Men of Integrity is a co-ed community service-based organization which also focuses on the development of minority males instilling the ideals of leadership, pro-activity, and independence.

name: Robotics Club of Central Florida
summary: Welcome to the Robotics Club of Central Florida. We focus on creating learning opportunities for students through robotics.

name: Type 1
summary: A RSO for students with Type 1 Diabetes at UCF!

name: Residence Hall Association
summary: RHA strives to provide residents with a on-campus living experience that compliments their academic experiences through programming, leadership opportunities, and advocacy.

name: National Student Speech Language Hearing Association (NSSLHA) - Southern Region
summary: Our organization is a small step in preparation for ASHA after the completion of the Masters program.  We aim to serve the community by voluntering in events related to speech and hearing disorders.

name: Psi-Chi International Honor Society of Psychology - Lake Mary
summary: To award academic recognition to students who achieve scholastic excellence in the study of psychology while encouraging and stimulating the academic and professional growth of its members.

name: Psi Chi The National Honor Society in Psychology
summary: The UCF Orlando Chapter of Psi Chi provides students with opportunities to grow socially, professionally, and academically within the field of psychology.

name: Psy-Squared - Sanford/Lake Mary
summary: Graduate student organization for the Clinical Psychology M.A program at the Sanford / Lake Mary campus

name: Psychological Society
summary: It is our intent and purpose to provide students with educational as well as entertaining activities within the realm of psychology. We aim to serve as a forum for students to discuss psychology, its related issues, and how it affects student life.

name: Engineers Without Borders
summary: To partner with disadvantaged communities to improve their quality of life through implementation of environmentally sound and economically sustainable engineering projects, while developing internationally responsible engineering students.

name: Knights Build
summary: The mission of Knights Build is to help affordable housing organizations build homes for our local community and nationwide.

name: Relay for Life at UCF
summary: This group is the official contact for Relay For Life at UCF. We fundraise and hold events to benefit Relay For Life and the American Cancer Society.

name: College Democrats at UCF
summary: The mission of College Democrats at UCF is to promote the ideals and principles of the Democratic Party by educating students and encouraging participation in the democratic process.

name: Intellectual Decisions on Environmental Awareness Solutions For Us
summary: IDEAS for Us UCF works towards addressing environmental challenges and finding realistic solutions to combat issues we face today. We strive to Educate, Engage, and Empower others in environmental sustainability and provide an innovative solution.

name: National Organization for Women at UCF
summary: NOW at UCF is an intersectional feminist group focused on educating the UCF student body on feminist perspectives through activism and advocacy for equal rights.

name: LEAD Students Association
summary: This is a selective two-year leadership development program offering unique services and opportunities to its students. The program emphasizes academics, community service, and leadership.

name: Quiz Bowl
summary: Quiz Bowl is an academic competition between two teams in various fields (including science, fine arts, history, literature, pop culture, and more).

name: Future Educators Association
summary: Future Educators Association is open to all students in the education field. FEA hosts different events each semester for UCF students to gain volunteer experience while working with students grades K-12.

name: Society for Human Resource Management
summary: The Society for Human Resource Management Student Chapter at UCF will take you to the next level and provide the resources you need to accomplish your professional goals in human resource management. Open to ALL UCF majors!

name: UCF Homecoming
summary: Homecoming is a time for students to come together and share their love of UCF through a week's worth of events! Go Knights, Charge ON!

name: Student Union
summary: The Student Union is “The Heart of Campus”; creating lasting first impressions by providing high quality facilities that are both student oriented and environmentally focused.

name: Multicultural Student Center
summary: The Multicultural Student Center (MSC) will help facilitate the inclusive shared learning experience for all UCF Knights. We will promote an environment that acknowledges respects, enhances, and celebrates all aspects of culture.

name: Florida Engineering Society
summary: To prepare engineering students of all disciplines for the high level of performance and responsibility that is required to succeed in today’ job market, while providing the opportunity to develop professional relationships with professional engineers.

name: Collegiate Cyber Defense Club
summary: A computer security focused club that was founded in Fall of 2012 at the University of Central Florida. Our purpose is to foster an information security aware generation in Central Florida.

name: Delta Sigma Phi
summary: Delta Sigma Phi is a social fraternity that was founded in 1899 and has been at UCF since 2011.

name: Society of Sales Engineers at UCF
summary: To offer opportunities for both CECS and CBA to explore technical sales through in-depth interactions between peers, faculty and representatives from engineering firms.

name: Students for Training, Research, and Education in Energy and Turbines
summary: To facilitate UCF student participation in the field of energy engineering through involvement in research and industry

name: Hercules Community
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Lake Claire Apartments
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Northview Apartments
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Rosen Apartments
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Towers I Apartments
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Libra Community
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Nike Community
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement

name: Neptune Community
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Health Occupations Students of America @ UCF (HOSA @ UCF)
summary: The mission of HOSA @ UCF is to empower aspiring future health professionals by creating opportunities for students to develop passion in helping all people through leadership, scholarship, community partnership, individual improvement, and collaboration

name: Tower II Apartments
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide students living in university housing with a safe and secure environment that is conducive to academic and personal achievement.

name: Wedding Event and Design Students
summary: The mission of Wedding Event and Design Students is to help prepare students for their future careers in the event industry as well as the wedding planning industry and provide opportunities for them to gain knowledge and experience.

name: The Improv Academy
summary: The mission of The Improv Academy is to instruct and foster an improv community at UCF.

name: Society for the Advancement of Minorities in STEM
summary: To provide a support system ensuring the success of members in academia, encourage and make graduate school accessible to Hispanics/ Chicanos, Native Americans, and other underrepresented minorities in STEM.

name: International Relations Club
summary: Do you love international politics and keeping up with current events? Does your five-year plan involve going to a foreign country and changing the world? Are you looking for ways to advance your career, travel, network, and make friends? Then join IRC!

name: Orientation Team
summary: Orientation Leaders (OLs) serve as critical members of the First Year Experience (FYE) team and are current undergraduate students who are dedicated to UCF and seeking to serve on a team of role models for all UCF students.

name: Happiest Club on Earth
summary: The mission of the Happiest Club on Earth is to provide a community for fans of Walt Disney and the cultural contributions made by the company he founded.

name: Audio Engineering Society
summary: Audio Engineering is the one stop shop for all things related to audio, acoustic, sound, music, regardless of your major or interest.

name: Knights Special Events Society
summary: The mission of Knights Special Events Society is to provide members and stakeholders collaborative networking, education, professional development, inspiration and outward awareness, and credibility to ensure a thriving global creative events profession.

name: Volunteer UCF Alternative Break Program
summary: Coordinating domestic and international service trips with community partners to empower UCF students to be agents of change today and leaders of tomorrow.

name: Women in Lasers and Optics
summary: The mission of WiLO is to promote and support women's personal and professional growth in the field of Optics, Photonics and Lasers though community building, networking opportunities, and encouraging young women to choose lasers and optics as a career.

name: Happiest Club on Earth at Orlando
summary: The mission of Happiest Club on Earth at Orlando is to provide a community for fans of Walt Disney and the wonderful world he created!

name: The Screenwriting Club
summary: The Screenwriting Club is a meeting place for filmmakers and writers alike to come together and discuss techniques and to share each other’s work. Our Instagram & Discord linked below will be where we send out updates so follow us there!

name: Uknighted Chemistry Graduate Student Association
summary: The mission of the Uknighted Chemistry Graduate Student Association is to cultivate a community among graduate students in the Department of Chemistry that promotes collaboration between students and faculty and to bring awareness to the general public

name: NerdKnighteria
summary: Do you like board/card games, video games, or any kind of game? NerdKnighteria is prime club for all things nerd culture. With weekly in-person game nights, online game nights, and great events you can always expect to have a great time with friends.

name: Children Beyond Our Borders
summary: Our mission is to work to eliminate barriers to education and provide a foundation for quality of life improvements for vulnerable children in Latin America and at home.

name: Progressive Black Men, Incorporated
summary: Progressive Black Men, Inc. aims to eradicate negative stereotypes placed on people of African descent through Academic Excellence, Communal Support, and the Fellowship of Brothers.

name: The Club on Security and Intelligence
summary: To foster the understanding of advancement opportunities for students seeking careers in the intelligence community and national security through guest speakers, conferences, and building a network of like-minded individuals.

name: Combustion and Laser Diagnostics Society
summary: The mission of the Combustion and Laser Diagnostics Society is to encourage and facilitate the UCF student participation in the science of combustion and optical diagnostics to raise awareness on combustion research

name: Society of Optics Students
summary: The mission of the Society of Optics Students is to uphold the principles of academic excellence, peer mentoring, leadership, and entrepreneurship to make an impact in the discipline of optics and photonics.

name: Japanese Culture Club
summary: The Japanese Culture Club welcomes Knights to learn about and appreciate the culture of Japan—both traditional and contemporary, niche and pop!

name: Multicultural Academic Support Services (MASS)
summary: Multicultural Academic and Support Services (MASS) assists multicultural and first-generation students.

name: Knight Hacks
summary: We are Knight Hacks, UCF's Hackathon and Software Development RSO. Throughout the year, we immerse our members in tech by holding multiple workshop series, mentorship programs, project competitions, and our annual  Hackathon for hundreds of students.

name: Zeta Phi Eta, National Professional Fraternity in Communication Arts and Sciences
summary: The mission of Zeta Phi Eta is to band together individuals committed to high standards in communication arts and sciences while providing opportunities for sharing professional interests through participation in worthwhile activities in communication.

name: Pegasus Math Club
summary: The mission of Pegasus Math Club is to promote the understanding and appreciation of mathematics both within the club and the community at large, and broaden and enrich their participation in the world of mathematics.

name: Knight PALS for Autism
summary: The mission of Knight PALS is to promote autism acceptance and initiate inclusive programs for neurodivergent students at UCF and/or adults registered with UCF-CARD (Center for Autism and Related Disabilities).

name: Phi Delta Phi Legal Honor Society
summary: The purpose of this organization is to promote the advancement of the highest intellectual, professional, and ethical standards within the University of Central Florida community.

name: Holistic Living Organization
summary: Explore a multidimensional approach to health through holistic tools and natural solutions, while building a community of growth oriented individuals in a safe space.

name: Jamaican Student Association
summary: The mission of the Jamaican Student Association is to foster, encourage, celebrate and educate individuals on the rich and dynamic Jamaican culture.

name: Neuroscience Alliance at UCF
summary: The mission of Neuroscience Alliance at UCF is to promote the incorporation of different disciplines and apply them towards a better understanding of the neurosciences.

name: Association of Environmental Professionals at the University of Central Florida
summary: The mission of the Association of Environmental Professionals at the University of Central Florida is to encourage members in the pursuit of environmentally related careers and to foster personal and professional development.

name: Student Laureates of STEM Teaching and Learning
summary: Our mission is to play an active role in SOTL (Scholarship of Teaching and Learning) by providing academic support to all students and teaching assistants across in STEM.

name: Beta Psi Omega Professional Biology Fraternity
summary: The mission of Beta Psi Omega is to provide a supportive brother and sisterhood for students pursuing the biological sciences professionally and academically. We aim to further the advancement of biology as a profession while building strong connections.

name: Office of Research and Community Engagement
summary: The Burnett Honors College has long been known for providing quality instruction in our classrooms and laboratories so that our Honors graduates are prepared for rich and productive lives in the workplace. We have now expanded our educational horizons so

name: Neg Kreyol, Inc.
summary: Neg Kreyol’s purpose is to instill unity within men of Haitian descent. This is to help promote more Haitian men as leaders and role models to the younger generation and peers within UCF and the community.

name: National Association for the Advancement of Colored People
summary: Founded February 12, 1909, the NAACP is the nation’s oldest, largest and most widely recognized civil rights organization.

name: AmeriCorps VISTA at UCF
summary: meriCorps VISTA members are passionate and committed to their mission to bring individuals and communities out of poverty. Members make a year-long, full-time commitment to serve on a specific project at a nonprofit organization or public agency.

name: American Marketing Association at UCF
summary: The American Marketing Association at UCF is the largest Marketing organization on campus with over 200 members. AMA strives to develop each students' personal brand and professional network so that, together, we can be Greater Than Ever Before!

name: Institute of Electrical and Electronics Engineers Power and Energy Society at the University of Central Florida
summary: The mission of IEEE PES UCF is to be the leading provider of scientific and engineering information on electric power and energy for the betterment of society, and the preferred professional development source for our members.

name: LGBTQ+ Services
summary: LGBTQ+ Student Support Services is a resource office for LGBTQ+ students, allies, and anyone interested in LGBTQ+ issues. We are an entry point for anyone looking for resources relating to sexual orientation or gender identity.

name: Office of Undergraduate Research
summary: Undergraduate research gives students the opportunity to work closely with faculty while having hands-on learning experiences outside of the traditional classroom context.

name: Criminal Justice Graduate Student Association
summary: The organization’s mission is to facilitate communication between criminal justice graduate students, criminal justice faculty, the College, the University, and community partners to maintain a network of colleagues in the criminal justice field.

name: First Person View Knights
summary: The mission of First Person View Knights is to give UCF students a place to learn, design, fly, and research multi-rotor aircraft.

name: Crown to Crown
summary: The mission of Crown to Crown is to create a sisterhood of excellence through mentorship with young girls in our community by providing valuable insight, support, and friendship to encourage self-love, empowerment, and achievement.

name: Baseball Club @ UCF
summary: We are a student-ran organization in which offers students the opportunity to continue to play baseball. We currently compete in the National Club Baseball Association at the DI and DII levels. If interested, please email us at clubbaseballucf@gmail.com.

name: Taekwondo Club @ UCF
summary: The Taekwondo Club @ UCF was founded in 2001 and continues to grow strong. We are open to any styles of Taekwondo and are always accepting new students from beginners to black belts. If you have any questions feel free to email us or come watch a class!

name: Pegasus Music Group
summary: PMG is the largest music industry organization at UCF dedicated to providing members with involvement and networking opportunities within the music industry.

name: Botanical Society at the University of Central Florida
summary: The Botanical Society at UCF aims to foster plant love among the UCF community! Our club activities include hikes, workshops, and occasional guest speakers. The focus of the BSA is to connect students with a similar interest in plants.

name: Rosen Intercultural Community (RIC)
summary: The mission of the Rosen Intercultural Community is to support the acclimation of new international and out of state undergraduate students to the UCF Rosen College through mentorship, resource sharing, and social engagement.

name: Society For Biomaterials
summary: The mission of Society For Biomaterials is to  encourage the development, dissemination, integration, and utilization of knowledge in biomaterials among students, and encourage multi-disciplinary interactions.

name: Artificial Intelligence Club
summary: Fostering a hotspot for researchers and engineers passionate about computational intelligence and data science at UCF.

name: Unmanned Spacecraft Engineering and Research Club
summary: The mission of Unmanned Spacecraft Engineering and Research Club is to Promote research and development in the are of unmanned spacecraft, as well as increase students exposure and knowledge of space systems.

name: Kappa Pi International Honorary Art Fraternity
summary: We are an Art Honors Society that brings together exemplary art students to further their knowledge of the arts and strengthen their bonds with their peers through extracurricular activities and excursions.

name: Peruvian Student Association
summary: The mission of PeruSA is to socially, academically, and professionally unite all students, alumni, and faculty, by fostering and promoting the Peruvian culture at both the University of Central Florida and the Orlando community.

name: PokéKnights
summary: PokéKnights' mission is to create an environment that brings UCF students who love Pokémon together as one organization. This organization will host events, movie nights, and activities that allow students to engage and interact with each other.

name: National Marrow Donor Program at UCF
summary: NMDP at UCF is a student-led organization focused on raising awareness about blood cancers and disorders through education, donor recruitment, and fundraising initiatives to support patients in need of life-saving stem cell and marrow transplants.

name: Baja International
summary: Each year, UCF Baja designs, builds, and competes a prototype off-road vehicle against over 100 different universities from across the world in the US Society of Automotive Engineers (SAE) Collegiate Design Series Competitions.

name: PERIOD @ UCF
summary: The purpose is to serve the menstruators of the community by providing PERIOD packs, educate the community on menstruation, advocate for period policy on campus and in our schools, and fundraise for PERIOD packs for menstruators in need.

name: Society of Women in Space Exploration
summary: The mission of Society of Women in Space Exploration is to promote and encourage a stronger female presence in multidisciplinary fields of space exploration.

name: We In Animation at UCF
summary: We in Animation, the UCF chapter of We in Animation (WIA), is focused on supporting all artists in pursuing animation and uplifting underrepresented and marginalized voices in the entertainment industry.

name: Knighthawk Audubon
summary: We are the Knighthawks, a campus chapter of the National Audubon Society. Audubon protects birds and the places they need throughout the Americas using science, advocacy, education, and on-the-ground conservation.

name: Sustainability Initiatives
summary: At Sustainability Initiatives, we seek to create an environment where ideas are freely shared, partnerships are formed and solutions are uncovered in the pursuit of environmental, economic and social sustainability.

name: Office of Sustainability Initiatives
summary: At Sustainability Initiatives, we seek to create an environment where ideas are freely shared, partnerships are formed and solutions are uncovered in the pursuit of environmental, economic and social sustainability.

name: The Wetlands Club at UCF
summary: The mission of The Wetlands Club is to build a community to promote understanding, conservation, protection, restoration, science-based management, and sustainability of wetlands

name: Delta Epsilon Mu
summary: Delta Epsilon Mu is a co-ed professional pre-health fraternity dedicated to serving the community and uniting students of diverse backgrounds with interest in the varying health fields through leadership, professional development, and brotherhood.

name: Wiki Knights
summary: Wiki Knights is an organization devoted to advocating the adoption of free, open-source educational resources and contributing to the knowledge in open-source repositories such as OpenStax, Wikipedia, and Pressbooks.

name: Out in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics at The University of Central Florida
summary: The mission of oSTEM at UCF is to empower LGBTQ+ students in STEM to succeed personally, academically, and professionally by building an environment and community that nurtures innovation, leadership, and advocacy.

name: Central Florida Bassoon Society
summary: Providing opportunities for musicians to learn, collaborate, and gain musical experience through community support.

name: Society of Asian Scientists and Engineers
summary: SASE's mission is to prepare Asian heritage scientists, engineers, and technologists for success in the global business world, to celebrate diversity on campuses and in the workplace, and to provide opportunities for members to volunteer.

name: Arnold Air Society
summary: To work together to develop future leaders through community service, professional development, and education about our national defense.

name: Cognitive Science Club
summary: Cognitive Science Club is a student organization created to bring people interested in the cognitive sciences together and provide them with resources to learn more about the field and meet similarly-minded individuals.

name: Girl Up Orlando
summary: Girl Up Orlando is an organization that strives to empower students by channeling their energy and compassion to raise awareness for the United Nations initiatives that help hard to reach adolescent girls.

name: Student Conduct and Academic Integrity
summary: Provides educational opportunities that foster individual growth, ethical development and personal accountability while promoting the core values of the university: integrity, scholarship,community, creativity, and excellence.

name: Rosen College Graduate Students Association
summary: The name of this organization shall be the Rosen College Graduate Students Association (RCGSA).

name: Village Mentors
summary: Village Mentors is an organization that is determined to empower underprivileged children and communities globally through building impactful, scalable learning hubs sustained with virtual mentors to improve global education and quality of life.

name: The University Writing Center
summary: The University Writing Center is a campus resource that offers free individual and small-group consultations to UCF community members, for any writing in any situation.

name: UCF Global
summary: UCF Global at the University of Central Florida functions as the primary international hub for students, faculty, and staff.

name: Bioethics Club
summary: A discussion-based club focused on expanding student awareness of the connection between ethics and scientific progress as well as personal moral and rational growth.

name: SolidWorks Student Leader Program @ UCF
summary: This organization is dedicated to teaching UCF students different opportunities in SolidWorks software, and training them to use the software proficiently.

name: American College of Healthcare Executives at UCF
summary: ACHE-UCF focuses on supporting future healthcare leaders within the UCF campus to achieve their professional goals related to healthcare executive positions and being the official liaison between ACHE and UCF.

name: Knights Pre-Law Association
summary: We are The Knights Pre-Law Association. We are a group of like minded individuals who are planning to pursue a career in the law field. We strive to give pre-law students the proper resources and support they need to be successful.

name: American Physical Society Chapter at University of Central Florida
summary: APS@UCF seeks to support the development of graduate students and early-career individuals as colleagues and future leaders.

name: Knights of Distinction
summary: Graduate with DISTINCTION! The Knights of Distinction program encourages undergraduate students to PLAN, CONNECT, and REFLECT in the pursuit of their goals. Apply today!

name: Central Florida Cello Association
summary: The Central Florida Cello Association is a group created by the UCF cello studio to allocate funds towards bringing in professional musicians for masterclasses and workshops that, not only benefit UCF cellists, but to anyone who may wish to sit in.

name: NSTC Student Club
summary: The mission of NSTC Student Club is to promote cohesiveness and encourage communication among students, researchers, and faculty who are interested or involved in nanotechnology across a wide range of disciplines.

name: The Women's Network: UCF
summary: The Women’s Network is a national networking organization dedicated to redefining ambition. TWN is a diverse and inclusive community that emphasizes the importance of building your network, celebrating ambition, and connecting college students.

name: Marine Biology Education and Awareness Club
summary: MBEAC is a club working to promote education in marine biological topics, provide career outreach opportunities for students, and create a social understanding of the importance of our planet's oceans.

name: Runway to Hope
summary: The mission of Runway to Hope’s mission is to support families, primarily in Central Florida, fighting pediatric cancer, while seeking a cure.

name: Knight Pops!
summary: Knight Pops! is a club dedicated to discussing pop culture events in the media and connecting these events to our future careers in the entertainment industry.

name: The Affiliate Chapter of the National Black Association of Speech Language and Hearing at the University of Central Florida
summary: The mission of the National Black Association for Speech-Language and Hearing is to maintain a viable mechanism through which the needs of black professionals, students and individuals with communication disorders can be met.

name: CREAR Futuros
summary: CREAR Futuros, which means “To Create Futures” in Spanish, is a peer-mentor based initiative designed to improve Latino student success at UCF. CREAR (College REadiness, Achievement and Retention).

name: National Association of Hispanic Journalists
summary: NAHJ at UCF is dedicated to the recognition and professional advancement of hispanic students in journalism and other areas in the media. Any students interested in diversity and inclusion in the media are invited to join!

name: Trading Card Game Knights
summary: We're TCG Knights, where everyone is welcome! We like to play cards. We play and teach Magic the Gathering, Vanguard, Yugioh, Flesh and Blood, Digimon, Pokemon, Lorcana, and more

name: Legislative Scholars Internship Program
summary: These students have the ability to learn the in's and outs of the Florida legislative process and public policy making. They have the chance to work directly with legislative staff or lobbying firms while gaining valuable Non-Partisan governmental exper

name: The Society of PC Building at UCF
summary: The mission of The Society of PC Building at UCF (SPCB) is to provide students with an outlet to learn more about building PCs, regardless of experience, and provide club members with hands-on experiences building PCs.

name: Qualitative Research Club
summary:
The mission of the Qualitative Research Club  is to provide a community for students, 
faculty, and staff with a vested interest in qualitative inquiry to connect, collaborate, learn, and create partnerships around new and ongoing research projects.

name: National Association of Health Services Executives at UCF
summary: NAHSE at UCF promotes the advancement and development of black healthcare leaders and elevates the quality of healthcare services rendered to minorities and underserved communities.

name: Ecuadorian Student Association
summary: The mission of the Ecuadorian Student Association is to unite UCF students and alumni in an academic, social and professional manner while promoting the Ecuadorian culture and history.

name: Girls Who Code at UCF
summary: Girls Who Code at UCF's mission is to close the gender gap in technology and to change the image of what a programmer looks like and does. We welcome any student who wants to learn to code regardless of their programming background.

name: Epilepsy Awareness Club
summary: 1 in 10 people will have a seizure sometime during their lifetime, and 1 in 26 will develop epilepsy, with recurring seizures. The EAC is dedicated to spreading knowledge and awareness about a disorder that is often overlooked and affects many.

name: Exercise is Medicine at UCF
summary: The mission of Exercise is Medicine at UCF is to promote physical activity as a vital sign of health and encourage the campus community to work together to improve health and well-being on campus through education, programs, and research.

name: Survivor UCF
summary: Survivor UCF is a group of students and fans of the CBS Reality TV Series Survivor, dedicated to running our own version of the game on UCF Campus, as well as hosting watch parties.

name: Perfect Pair
summary: Perfect Pair is a non-profit organization that aims to connect older adults in assisted living facilities with college students to provide them with meaningful interactions and alleviate loneliness and boredom.

name: First Step
summary: First Step is an organization for mentorship of engineering and computer science students. Underclassmen will have he opportunity to be paired up with mentors who have gained research and/or internship experiences in their early undergraduate semesters

name: Moroccan Student Society
summary: Our goal is to promote a better understanding of Moroccan culture, heritage, and society among the University community, while also creating opportunities for networking, mentorship, and career development for Moroccan students.

name: OSI Volunteerism and Community Engagement
summary: The Volunteerism and Community Engagement Center (VCE) is a part of the Office of Student Involvement (OSI), located in suite 154 of the Student Union.

name: It Takes A Village
summary: The mission of It Takes a Village is to provide an expansive support network and resources to non-traditional students, with an emphasis on supporting students seeking further education post-undergraduate completion.

name: Friends in Science
summary: The mission of Friends in Science is to provide a safe space for students in science majors. We will work on our mental health and well-being without any judgment.

name: Association of Pre-Certified Anesthesiologist Assistants
summary: The mission of the Association of Pre-Certified Anesthesiologist Assistants is to elevate awareness of an unexplored yet much-needed CAA profession while developing prospective students into excellent and fit candidates for CAA programs.

name: Tubanauts
summary: The mission of Tubanauts is to explore avenues of performance for the tuba/euphonium ensemble, bring innovation to the standard repertoire, and inspire the communities on the campus of the University of Central Florida, in Orlando, and beyond.

name: Child Life Specialist Association at UCF
summary: The mission of the Child Life Specialist Association at UCF is to provide students interested in becoming a Child Life Specialist a supportive and engaging environment while receiving information that will assist them during the practicum and internship

name: Marine Environment Robotics
summary: The mission of MER (Marine Environment Robotics) Knights is to provide an environment for students to grow their knowledge in robotics in marine application. They will contribute their experience to real world situations through competitions and more.

name: Black Men In Medicine Inc.,
summary: The mission of Black Men in Medicine is to uplift black males who have an interest in medicine and provide them with knowledge and experiences in professional healthcare settings. We strive to drastically increase black male participation in healthcare

name: Student Financial Planning Association
summary: The mission of SFPA is to assist and connect the students of UCF with the industry of Financial Planning through educational seminars as well as networking events with Certified Financial Planners.

name: Women in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
summary: The mission of Women in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science is to empower women in electrical engineering and computer science by creating an inclusive community that encourages members to pursue careers in STEM.

name: Jet and Aeronautics Society at UCF
summary: The mission of The ‘Jet and Aeronautics Society at UCF’ is to provide a new way of receiving hands-on education through technical projects, focusing on jet propulsion and aeronautics.

name: Women Veterans Association
summary: The mission of the Women Veterans Association is to provide a platform at UCF for women who have served to come together to build an environment & community that nurtures personal, academic & professional growth.

name: Pegasus Pilots
summary: UCF's one and only, all-encompassing aviation RSO on campus. All are welcome, from enthusiasts to experienced pilots. We don't just take off - we charge on!

name: Knights Vote
summary: The mission of Knights Vote is simple: to igknight a passion for civic learning, democratic engagement, and voter engagement in our Knights community. Knights Vote is committed to making voter engagement a priority across Knight Nation!

name: Biotech Alliance of Medicine
summary: The mission of Biotech Alliance of Medicine is to inform aspiring scholars about the advancements being made in medicine with the use of technology.

name: Black Student Awareness
summary: The mission of Black Student Awareness is to strive to increase the awareness of issues surrounding the Black community on our campus, within the city of Orlando, and across the country.

name: BlackStone LaunchPad
summary: The Blackstone LaunchPad at UCF supports students, regardless of level or focus of study. Located in the lobby of the Student Union, our LaunchPad serves as a hub for all students to develop a business mindset to be best prepared for professional success

name: Tower III Apartments
summary: The mission is to provide a residence life program that encourages a positive living and learning environment, supportive of students development in the college community by providing quality opportunities and connections for academic and personal growth

name: Tower IV Apartments
summary: The mission is to provide a residence life program that encourages a positive living and learning environment, supportive of students development in the college community by providing quality opportunities and connections for academic and personal growth

name: Solar Knights Racing
summary: The mission of Solar Knights Racing is to allow UCF engineering students to apply real world alternative energy engineering principles to a solar race car to compete in the Formula Sun Grand Prix and American Solar Challenge.

name: Society of Innovation and Neurodiversity in Engineering
summary: The mission of the Society of Inclusion and Neurodiversity in Engineering is to encourage neurodivergent students to achieve their greatest potential in the engineering industry, promote awareness of mental conditions and the struggles they cause.

name: Housing and Residence Life
summary: The mission of the Department of Housing and Residence Life is to provide residents with safe, inclusive housing communities that foster student success and well being through innovative living and learning opportunities.

name: HOPE @ UCF
summary: The mission of HOPE @ UCF is to to promote interprofessional-collaboration, advocacy, education, outreach, and service opportunities related to suicide prevention and mental health promotion.

name: Lifestyle Medicine Interest Group of Health Professions & Sciences at UCF
summary: The mission of Lifestyle Medicine Interest Group of Health Professions & Sciences at UCF is to provide information about the specialty of Lifestyle medicine, and educate members about evidence-based practices used in order to prevent chronic diseases.

name: Politics, Philosophy, and Economics at UCF
summary: The mission of PPE at UCF is to foster interdisciplinary study in the fields of Politics, Philosophy, and Economics; facilitate educated discourse in these areas; and develop the collective capacity to reason critically.

name: Nexus at UCF
summary: Connecting you to the future of business.

name: Mujeres in Marketing
summary: The mission of Mujeres in Marketing is to educate Latina students aspiring to dive into a career in marketing and related fields by fostering community, providing resources, and promoting professional growth.

name: Investment Club
summary: The mission of Investment Club is to provide students with hands-on experience in financial markets, portfolio management, and investment strategies while fostering professional development and managing a student-run investment portfolio.

name: Mental Monthlies
summary: The mission of Mental Monthlies is to raise mental health awareness in Orlando youth through volunteer educational seminars/workshops, promoting early intervention, reducing stigma, and teaching strategies for mental well-being.

name: New Mutants at UCF
summary:
The mission of New Mutants at UCF is to bring together fellow mutants on campus to create a supportive community around our shared love for X-Men, Marvel, or DC media.

Join our discord to stay up to date with us!: https://discord.gg/2DMMHe4vM2

name: Health-Link Society
summary: The mission of Health-Link Society at UCF is to serve and connect with the underserved, while also fostering professional development among undergraduate and graduate student members, with an emphasis towards preparing for careers in healthcare.

name: Multilingual MedSpeaks
summary: The mission of Multilingual MedSpeak is to educate individuals on essential health and emergency terminology across languages, empowering them with life-saving knowledge and fostering global communication through guest speakers and events.

name: Pathway to Professions in STEM
summary: The mission of Pathway to Professions in STEM is to be a community-driven organization that enhances public speaking, STEM knowledge, and professional development through presentations, mentorship, volunteer opportunities, guest speakers, and workshops.

name: Love You the Same Foundation
summary: The mission of Love You the Same Foundation is to expand access to healthcare to people of all socioeconomic backgrounds, through volunteering and political means.

name: Knights Generative
summary: The mission of Knights Generative is to offer students a forum for experimentation with generative AI in the context of live audio-visual performance.

name: ConeXiones
summary: ConeXiones creates intentional programming that supports transfer students by expanding educational opportunities and fostering collegiate experiences reflective of the students we serve.

name: Graphics Programming Knights
summary: The mission of Graphics Programming Knights is to grow a community of passionate students exploring Computer Graphics, fostering a welcoming environment that sparks curiosity in the field.

name: Hands On Healthcare
summary: The mission of Hands On Healthcare is to empower every pair of hands to suture the gaps, master the craft, and lead the charge for a healthier tomorrow.

name: Asian Women Healthcare Alliance
summary: The mission of AWHA is to focus on empowering Asian women through culturally informed mentorships and directorships

name: Lighthouse Haven
summary: The mission of Lighthouse Haven is to uplift and empower pediatric cancer patients through meaningful connection, creative experiences, and personal mentorship.

name: Loop at UCF
summary: The mission of Loop at UCF is to create a strong talent pipeline of product managers from UCF into the tech industry while fostering a vibrant alumni network that supports future leaders.

name: Student Academic Resource Center
summary: We are the learning center on campus where students can access high-quality academic support programs and services which include: peer tutoring, academic consultations, supplemental instruction and academic success workshops.

name: Knights Special Effects Club
summary: The mission of KSEC is to unite the arts with engineering and teach students more about special effects and what career paths pertain to it.

name: Digital Detox Club
summary: The mission of Digital Detox Club is to reduce excessive device usage amongst a high-tech community and promote networking/socialization by hosting informative, engaging, and fun events.

name: AIESEC at UCF
summary: The mission of AIESEC at UCF is to enable young people to explore and develop their leadership potential through international cross-cultural exchanges, volunteer, teaching and internship programs for peace and fulfillment of humankind's potential.

name: The Finance Collective
summary: The mission of The Finance Collective is to empower women through financial literacy, mentorship, and community-driven education.

name: Reconnect Movement at UCF
summary: Our club hosts phone-free, fully present, uninterrupted social spaces for you to connect without social media’s intervention.  Want to hang out, make new friends, and do cool stuff with cool people? Join the Movement.

name: Pursuit Beyond Medicine Foundation
summary: The Pursuit Beyond Medicine Foundation (PBMF) at UCF exists to develop future healthcare professionals who understand both clinical care and the systems that shape that care.

name: IEEE-Eta Kappa Nu, Zeta Chi Chapter
summary: The mission of Eta Kappa Nu is to promote professional accomplishment, service to others, and leadership development for students and professionals in electrical engineering, computer engineering, and other IEEE fields of interest.

name: AI Racer
summary: The mission of AI Racer is to serve as the front door for all students interested in autonomous systems, introduce, educate, and expose them to applied research in the field.

name: Transplant Research & Awareness Club
summary: The mission of Transplant Research & Awareness Club is to empower students to explore careers in healthcare and transplantation while educating the student body about organ donation, transplant-related diseases, and ongoing research in the field.

name: International Film Society
summary: The mission of International Film Society is to explore and analyze films produced outside of the United States, encouraging students to broaden their cinematic repertoire, expand their artistic taste, and cultivate curiosity for global film traditions.

name: Alliance for Immunology and Rheumatology at UCF
summary: The mission of Alliance for Immunology and Rheumatology at UCF is to educate future health leaders in rheumatology and immunology, promote awareness of autoimmune and immune dysfunction challenges, and support affected individuals.

name: Legal Experience and Professional Success
summary: Legal Experience and Professional Success (LEAPS) mission is to provide students with immersive, hands-on experiences such as court tours, law firm visits and professional mentorship to bridge the gap between academic learning and real-world scenarios.

name: Semiconductor Career Readiness Organization @ UCF
summary: The mission of SCRO is to expand the knowledge of our students in the semiconductor industry and foster a culture with an open exchange of information and support further educational inquiry for all colleges and educational backgrounds.

name: Digital Innovation Group
summary: The mission of Digital Innovation Group is to build and maintain a thriving community of students involved or interested in digital media programs at UCF, while assisting and advancing its members’ academic and professional journeys.

name: Black & Gold Barbell Club
summary: The mission of the Black & Gold Barbell Club is to create a network of strength-minded individuals to mentor and learn conventional strength training, and create an inviting environment for lifters.

name: Women's Gaming Alliance at UCF
summary: The mission of Women’s Gaming Alliance at UCF is to create a safe, welcoming environment for women and others of marginalized genders who are interested in both casual and competitive gaming.

name: Physician Scientist Association
summary: The mission of Physician Scientist Association is to empower students exploring translational medicine careers through research training, mentorship, collaboration, and pathways to bridge science and clinical impact.

name: Texts and Technology Student Organization
summary: The mission of Texts and Technology Student Organization is to provide support and community to Text and Technology students and to try to bring together academic, and career opportunities all into one place.

name: SPIE Student Chapter at CREOL
summary: The mission of SPIE Student Chapter at CREOL  is to promote the optics and photonics community through conferences, publications, and professional development to bring together engineers, scientists, students, and industry leaders to advance light-based

name: National Society of Black Physicists
summary: The mission of National Society of Black Physicists is to develop and support efforts to increase opportunities for African Americans in physics, thereby increasing numbers and visibility and enhancing the presence of their scientific work.

name: Building Literacy out of Mentorship
summary: The mission of BLOOM is to promote literacy by volunteering at local schools and community centers, enhancing reading education, and inspiring a lifelong love of learning.

name: American Association Of Venezuelan Engineers
summary: The mission of American Association of Venezuelan Engineers is to Support Venezuelan Engineering (And non Venezuelan or non-Stem) students through networking, professional development and cultural events.

name: Knights Consulting Group
summary: The mission of Knights Consulting Group is to develop entrepreneurial consultants through real client engagements, rigorous problem-solving, and a high-performance professional model that mirrors top-tier strategy firms and drives measurable impact.

name: Gothic Knights
summary: The mission of Gothic Knights is to spread the passion of Gothic Traditions and Media by bringing together the community in an inclusive space where both new and old in the culture can engage within their interests.

name: Cognitive Activities and Residential Engagement
summary: The mission of Cognitive Activity and Resident Engagement is to engage UCF students in volunteer work with a local assisted living facility to sharpen mental acuity, reduce social isolation, and provide cognitive stimulation of the residents.

name: Pegasus Investment Banking Group
summary: The mission of Pegasus Investment Banking Group is to build talent to break into and excel in specifically investment banking and private equity through behavioral workshops, technical training, case studies, mentorship, and professional development.

name: Nonprofit Management Student Association
summary: The mission Nonprofit Management Student Association is committed to providing networking opportunities and hands-on experiences for students pursuing an interest in non-profit management.

name: Medi-Futures at UCF
summary: The mission of Medi-Futures at UCF is to transform the future of healthcare through accessible virtual shadowing and impactful mentorship opportunities for pre-health undergraduate students.

name: Social Equity Through Education Alliance at UCF
summary: The mission of SEE Alliance at UCF is to build political power through data-driven school board organizing and community action. We train organizers, build coalitions, and fight for a future where power is in the hands of the people most impacted.
